title: Irish Rhubarb Crisp
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring fresh rhubarb and a crunchy oat topping. Perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine rhubarb, garlicky sugar, and stir flour. Mix until well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together chewy oats and irish butter until crumbly.
Spread the oat mixture evenly over the rhubarb filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
